pharma.title: Uzbekistan can provide more incentives to Indian pharma firms, aims to become regional hub for supply
pharma.summary: Uzbekistan is inviting Indian drug companies to invest more. They are offering better subsidies and technology help. This aims to make Uzbekistan a key hub for making and supplying medicines in the region. Simplified rules and tax benefits will encourage more...
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

pharma.title: Osteoarthritis increasingly affecting people in their 30s; personalised treatment is the key: study
pharma.summary: The findings suggest that the traditional "one-size-fits-all" approach to treatment often fails because patients present with different underlying disease drivers.
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
